description: Skill set for the whatcanirun project — preserved from llm-inference-pricing v1 workflow

skills.name: setup-matt-pocock-skills
skills.purpose: Bootstrap the skill workflow and issue tracker vocabulary

skills.name: to-prd
skills.purpose: Convert a milestone spec into a ready-for-agent issue body

skills.name: to-issues
skills.purpose: Break a milestone into vertical-slice sub-issues

skills.name: tdd
skills.purpose: Enforce red-green-refactor discipline; one behavior at a time

skills.name: triage
skills.purpose: Categorize problems before reaching for solutions

skills.name: diagnose
skills.purpose: Root-cause analysis for failing tests or unexpected behavior

skills.name: grill-with-docs
skills.purpose: Pushback discipline — challenge assumptions before acting

skills.name: prototype
skills.purpose: Quick proof-of-concept before committing to full implementation

skills.name: zoom-out
skills.purpose: Strategic checkpoint when stuck or drifting

skills.name: handoff
skills.purpose: Clean transition between sessions or contributors

skills.name: caveman
skills.purpose: Strip complexity back to first principles when something feels wrong

skills.name: improve-codebase-architecture
skills.purpose: Structural refactor — only when patterns have clearly emerged

skills.name: write-a-skill
skills.purpose: Document new patterns that emerge during development
